name: MannaWars
short_description: MannaWars is a fast top-down arcade space shooter. Fight PVP battles with up to 32 players, or try your luck in CO-OP mode against waves of enemies! As long as one of your team survives, the whole team survives! All modes are available in single-player as well!
detailed_description:
MannaWars is a fast top-down arcade space shooter, set in a universe ruled by angry gods. Partake in the grand tournament the gods have created, after ripping all inhabited planets in half.

Fight for mankind's survival in various game modes, such as deathmatch, team deathmatch, last man standing and diplomatic rescue!

Find the best combination of ship, weapon, shield and items! Blast your enemies with lasers, rockets, railguns, and much more! Drop proximity mines, use the teleporter to surprise your opponents, or just use the thumper to get them out of your way!
